channel.title: Risk Treatment on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Risk Treatment on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.

item.title: Creating a Strong Risk Management Program for Cybersecurity
item.category: "cybersecurity" , "risk management" , "security posture" , "risk assessment" , "risk mitigation" , "risk monitoring" , "threats" , "vulnerabilities" , "information security" , "data protection" , "compliance" , "cyber attacks" , "decision making" , "cost reduction" , "business continuity" , "risk analysis" , "risk identification" , "risk control" , "risk treatment" , "continuous improvement"
item.description: Learn about the importance of risk management in cybersecurity and how to create a program that works for your business.
